subcodes.first_line: He is God! O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Thou hadst written about the turmoil in Persia... O my God, O my God! Verily, Thy gracious herald and Thy steadfast servant who remaineth firm in the Straight Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از اغتشاش ایران مرقوم نموده بودید این تشویش... الهی الهی انّ بشیرک الکریم و رقیقک الثّابت علی العهد القویم
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for forgiveness
